name: @sawala/akuna-react
description: Drop-in membership UI for your website — bring your own Clerk app, add sign-up/sign-in and a synced member directory with one Sawala API key and no backend.
author: Sawala Cloud <hello@sawala.co> (https://sawala.co)

scripts.verify-bundle: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),src=fs.readFileSync('src/index.ts','utf8'),dist=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8');for (const m of ['MembershipProvider','useMember']) { if (src.includes(m) && !dist.includes(m)) { console.error('publish guard: dist/ is missing marker present in src/:', m); process.exit(1); } }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run verify-bundle
